reviews.comment:
La YPF de Godoy Cruz que pertence al ACA debe ser por lejos la estación de servicios mas lenta de toda CABA.
Yo no se si es porque están acostumbrados a los socios del ACA que un poco mas y les piden que le hagan el service completo al auto, pero tardan una eternidad en cargar nafta. Deberia haber un par de surtidores express para los que solo cargamos nafta y listo.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF in Godoy Cruz, which belongs to the ACA, must be by far the slowest service station in all of Buenos Aires.
I don't know if it's because they're used to ACA members, who are a bit more accustomed to asking them to do a full service on their car, but it takes forever to fill up with gas. There should be a couple of express pumps for those of us who just fill up with gas and that's it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzcnMtR2FnEAE

reviews.comment:
De las mejores YPF que he visitado. Excelente atención de los playeros! Un detalle: tiene puesto para inflar ruedas de bicicletas!

(Translated by Google)
One of the best YPF stations I've visited. Excellent service from the attendants! A nice touch: they have a station for inflating bicycle tires!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzOXA3aE13EAE

reviews.comment:
Muuuy lentos para atender ,tes que quedarte parado con balizas en el medio de la calle con 7 surtidores en marcha, son muy panchos

(Translated by Google)
Extremely slow service; you have to stand there with your hazard lights on in the middle of the street with seven pumps running. They're incredibly uncooperative.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzdXVxRmF3EAE
